mission_09:
## What You Will Learn

In this mission, you will master Table creation, schema design, data types, constraints (PRIMARY KEY, FOREIGN KEY, UNIQUE, NOT NULL), and ALTER TABLE modifications.

### Key Concepts
- Core concepts and syntax for this mission
- Practical implementation patterns
- Common pitfalls and best practices

### Why This Matters
These SQL skills are essential for professional database development, analytics engineering, and building robust data-driven applications.
